name: NEWMARKET CORP
business: NewMarket Corporation, through its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells petroleum additives (lubricant and fuel additive packages) and specialty materials (ammonium perchlorate for solid rocket motors and hydrazine for aerospace and defense applications). The company also markets antiknock compounds in North America and provides contracted manufacturing services.
sellsTo: Integrated oil companies and independent compounders/blenders for lubricant additives
Major fuel marketers and refiners for fuel additives
Rocket motor manufacturers supplying U.S. Department of War and NASA programs for ammonium perchlorate
U.S. government agencies, government contractors, and commercial aerospace customers for hydrazine

exposures.sentence: AMPAC is a manufacturer of specialty materials primarily used in solid rocket motors for the aerospace and defense industries, and Calca is a producer of hydrazine products used primarily in aerospace and defense applications.
Ammonium perchlorate is also used in space exploration programs for the National Aeronautics and Space Administration (NASA) and commercial space launch vehicles.
As a leading additive supplier to the electric vehicle market, we are investing in and delivering new technologies to enable electric vehicle market growth to help reduce carbon emissions.
As a specialty chemicals company, Afton develops and manufactures highly formulated lubricant and fuel additive packages and markets and sells these products worldwide.
Petroleum additives are used in lubricating oils and fuels to enhance their performance in machinery, vehicles, and other equipment.

We produce multiple grades of hydrazine, including Ultra Pure and high-purity hydrazine, which are manufactured to meet stringent customer and program-specific specifications for aerospace and defense applications.

catalysts.event: Completion of ammonium perchlorate production capacity expansion at AMPAC, increasing capacity by more than 50%
catalysts.sentence: The project of up to $100 million, which began in 2025, is currently scheduled to be completed towards the end of 2026 and includes the construction of an additional production line, increasing capacity by more than 50%.
